description: A textarea input in various styles.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra CSS class(es) for the rendered textarea

props.name: description
props.description: Optional description (help text) displayed below the label, wired to aria-describedby

props.name: descriptionClassName
props.description: Optional CSS for any rendered description [text-base-content/60 text-sm]

props.name: errors
props.description: Optional errors component to display below textarea field

props.name: errorsClassName
props.description: Optional CSS for any rendered errors [bg-error text-error-content]

props.name: fieldsetClassName
props.description: Optional CSS for the outer fieldset wrapper

props.name: label
props.description: Visual label for this textarea field

props.name: labelClassName
props.description: (should set the width of the label area to match multiple fields)

props.name: name
props.description: Textarea field name (also used as id)
